holo_siren.name: Holo-Siren
holo_siren.description: A dancer of pure light, all curve and shimmer, whose looping song slides straight into your neural lace and asks you to stay.

chrome_vixen.name: Chrome Vixen
chrome_vixen.description: A gynoid with a predator's grace and a showgirl's smile, mirror-polished and moving like she's always mid-performance.

static_nymph.name: Static Nymph
static_nymph.description: She flickers between wall sockets in a dress of loose current, giggling in white noise, leaving lipstick burns on the conduits.

vent_dryad.name: Vent Dryad
vent_dryad.description: An androgynous spore-being grown around the air system, willowy and languid, exhaling sweetness you know better than to breathe.

cryo_duelist.name: Cryo Duelist
cryo_duelist.description: A fencer sculpted from living ice, androgynous and elegant, who salutes before every bout and means it.

plasma_dancer.name: Plasma Dancer
plasma_dancer.description: She burns in slow motion, trailing veils of fire like silk, and every step closer raises the temperature two degrees.

neural_temptress.name: Neural Temptress
neural_temptress.description: She never moves. She doesn't need to. The whisper arrives already inside your head, wearing your own voice, asking you to lower your guard.

razor_doll.name: Razor Doll
razor_doll.description: A porcelain-faced automaton in a ballerina's frame, beautiful until the fans of blades unfold from her sleeves.

ion_valkyrie.name: Ion Valkyrie
ion_valkyrie.description: Winged in charged plasma, tall and radiant, she descends like judgment with a smile that says she's already chosen you.

synth_medusa.name: Synth Medusa
synth_medusa.description: Fiber-optic serpents crown her like living jewelry. Meet her gaze and your HUD starts agreeing with everything she says.

mirage_twins.name: Mirage Twins
mirage_twins.description: Two identical figures sharing one shadow, finishing each other's movements, and only one of them is ever really there.

inferno_diva.name: Inferno Diva
inferno_diva.description: An opera of heat in a gown of magma-glass. Her high note melts bulkheads; her encore is worse.

warden_lyss.name: Warden Lyss
warden_lyss.description: The Substrate's self-appointed jailer — statuesque, frost-armored, achingly formal. She'd rather you surrendered. She always asks nicely first.

moves.name: Cryostasis Seal
moves.telegraph: Frost crawls up Warden Lyss's arms as she begins drawing a sealing sigil in the air. Brace yourself.

overclock_queen.name: Overclock Queen
overclock_queen.description: A regal figure on a throne of stripped processors, crowned in arcing current, ruling a court of humming fans. She thinks you're a fascinating peripheral.

moves.name: Full Overclock
moves.telegraph: The Queen's crown of current flares white — every fan in her court screams to full speed. Get ready.

spore_matriarch.name: Spore Matriarch
spore_matriarch.description: Mother to every bloom in the deep vents — vast, serene, and terribly fond of visitors. Her garden keeps whoever falls asleep in it.

moves.name: Bloom Embrace
moves.telegraph: The Matriarch opens her arms, and the air goes thick and sweet with spores. You know what comes next.

chrome_contessa.name: The Chrome Contessa
chrome_contessa.description: Nobility of the upper Substrate: a towering gynoid aristocrat in liquid-metal couture, flanked by curtseying drones. She duels every guest personally. It would be rude not to.

moves.name: Curtsy of Blades
moves.telegraph: The Contessa sinks into a deep, gleaming curtsy — fans of blades unfolding from her sleeves. Guard, now.

phases.text: The Contessa sheds her gown-armor in a cascade of liquid metal — faster now, and furious, and laughing.

neon_seraph.name: Neon Seraph
neon_seraph.description: Six wings of pure signal, a halo of warning glyphs, and a face you're sure you've seen in an ad you can't remember. Being noticed by her feels like sunburn.

moves.name: Halo Cascade
moves.telegraph: The Seraph's halo fractures into a ring of falling glyphs, each one brightening toward white. Cover!

phases.text: Her halo inverts — the light goes soft and terribly intimate. The Seraph is inside your head now. (Her element has shifted!)

substrate_empress.name: The Substrate Empress
substrate_empress.description: The deepest dream of the machine beneath the city, wearing a crown of every lost signal Nexus ever swallowed. She has been expecting you — she says it like an old friend would.

moves.name: Requiem of Signals
moves.telegraph: Every lost signal the city ever swallowed rises around the Empress in a slow chorus. It is beautiful. It is aimed at you.

phases.text: The crown wakes. Lights kindle across the whole floor as the Empress stops being polite.
The city dreams with her now — the walls themselves lean in to shield their Empress.

nyx_deep_signal.name: Nyx, the Deep Signal
nyx_deep_signal.description: The Substrate's oldest dream, wearing a body of signal and smoke because you needed something to look at. She has been waiting ten floors to meet you properly.

moves.name: Undertow Kiss
moves.telegraph: Nyx drifts close enough to share breath, lips parting around a hum you feel in your fillings. Guard — or don't.

moves.name: Total Eclipse
moves.telegraph: She unfolds — all of her at once, every frequency, entirely too much to look at. You are going to look.

phases.text: Nyx laughs, delighted, and the room's power grid leans in to listen. "Oh, you're LOVELY. Again."
The smoke thins. Underneath is something small and bright and almost human, fighting like it finally has something to lose.

mirrorblade_duessa.name: Mirrorblade Duessa
mirrorblade_duessa.description: The Pit's first gatekeeper fights in a suit of mirror-shards, so every opponent spends the bout watching themselves lose. She signs autographs mid-parry.

moves.name: Thousand Reflections
moves.telegraph: Duessa fans her mirrored blades wide — a hundred little yous, all about to be hit at once.

phases.text: Duessa sheds the cracked mirrors and grins with her own face for the first time. Faster now.

saint_voltage.name: Saint Voltage
saint_voltage.description: Second champion of the Pit, canonized by the crowd after she kissed a live main and stood back up. Her halo is an arc-flash that never quite finished happening.

moves.name: Benediction
moves.telegraph: Saint Voltage raises two fingers, sainted and sparking. The air goes greasy with charge.

phases.text: Her halo widens. The front row's hair stands up as one.
"CANONIZE ME AGAIN," she laughs, and the lights above the Pit brown out.

gravekeeper_lull.name: The Gravekeeper, Lull
gravekeeper_lull.description: Third champion. She retired undefeated, twice, and both retirements are buried under the Pit with little chrome headstones. Slow voice, slower hands, and somehow you're already losing.

moves.name: Lights Out
moves.telegraph: Lull tilts her head, almost tender, the way you'd look at something already asleep.

moves.name: Little Headstone
moves.telegraph: She draws a slow line across the floor with her boot. Fighters know it: she's measuring your plot.

phases.text: Lull rolls her shoulders and the frost on the cage bars thickens. "Third retirement," she murmurs. "You'd be a lovely reason."
For the first time all bout, the Gravekeeper hurries.

zenith_crowds_own.name: Zenith, the Crowd's Own
zenith_crowds_own.description: The undisputed apex of the Pit — and of everything under Nexus City, including what sleeps below floor ten. Zenith doesn't fight the crowd's favorite; Zenith IS the crowd, ten thousand wanting minds braided into one beautiful body that hits like consensus.

moves.name: Standing Ovation
moves.telegraph: The whole Pit rises to its feet at once — every fist in the crowd cocked back as Zenith's.

moves.name: Final Bow
moves.telegraph: Zenith bows to you, deep and gracious. In the Pit, that means goodbye.

phases.text: The crowd's roar changes key. Zenith flexes and the arena lights arc toward them like iron filings.
Zenith stops performing. Ten thousand held breaths make the air heavy as water.
For one impossible second the crowd is silent — and Zenith, alone in their own head at last, fights like it.

ondo_the_bell.name: Ondo “The Bell” Marr
ondo_the_bell.description: The founder steps down from the bell rope, hangs their longcoat on the hook that has waited fifteen years, and rolls their shoulders once. They are not the hardest fight in the Pit. They are the reason the Pit measures hardness.

moves.name: First Bell
moves.telegraph: Ondo reaches up without looking and rings the bell themself. The tone hangs in the tank — low, patient, incoming.

moves.name: Fifteen Years
moves.telegraph: They take one slow step back and study you the way they study every fighter on the card: kindly, and completely.

phases.text: Ondo smiles for the first time all fight. “There you are,” they say, and the crowd forgets to breathe.
FINAL ROUND. The bell rings itself — nobody touched it — and the founder stops holding back what retirement never took.
